def positive_deserialization_from_external_or_user_controlled_source_with_pickle():
    rule_id = "deserialization_from_external_or_user_controlled_source_with_pickle"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "pickle.loads or pickle.load called on data from an external or user-controlled source."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
